questionHtml: Outline a named example of the captive breeding and reintroduction of an endangered animal species.
markschemeHtml:
a. name of organism ✔

b. why endangered ✔

c. where bred ✔

d. how programme carried out ✔

e. success rate ✔

To award [3] name of organism, either scientific or correct common name, must be given.

eg Giant panda

eg loss of habitat/hunted for fur

eg in zoos/ex situ/in situ/China

eg bred/raised in captivity

eg relative success re: introducing to wild/some reproduction in zoos

meta.title: Outline a named example of the captive breeding and reintroduction of an endangered animal species.
